column1: ZW Consulting LLC — Cash basis sole prop / SMLLC — Schedule C

column2: Treatment
Calendar year 2025. Cash basis. Schedule C (Form 1040) as sole prop / SMLLC.
Donna Walker's "Side Hustle / Sole Prop" COA — Schedule C aligned, parent (Sch C line) + child (GL sub-account).
$0.70 per business mile. Standard mileage OR actual expenses (not both). Parking and tolls on business trips deductible in addition.
Trips to/from regular workplace = commute = NOT deductible. Regus coworking = regular workplace. Workplace ↔ client site = deductible.
Lyft/Lime/Clipper deductible only for legitimate business purpose (not commute). User estimate: 25% of TY 2025 Public Transit was non-commute.
Deductible if away from tax home overnight for business. User: Southwest/COT $505 was personal → excluded.
50% deductible if business purpose documented (contact, reason).
Deductible at business-use % under §162. User estimate: 75%. Documentation method (time-based or sqft) required.
100% biz SaaS (Claude, OpenAI, GitHub, Notion, MS, Lucid, GoDaddy, n8n). Consumer subs (Spotify) excluded.
Payments to independent contractors. Each contractor ≥$600/yr requires 1099-NEC. Identified: Daniel Canosa, Steve, Steven Atkin, Ruben.
Tangible property up to $2,500/item expensed without capitalization (no AFS). MacBook ($2,031.68) qualifies. Election statement required.
Above-the-line for premiums actually paid (medical/dental/vision/LTC). Form 7206 calc. User on Medi-Cal — deduction limited to private supplemental premiums paid.
CC payments, internal transfers, family gifts (D. Walker / Rent Assistance), refunds — excluded from P&L (no impact).
CA may consider as "doing business in CA" under R&TC §23101 → potential CA filing. Multi-state issue flagged for Rozella.
